decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a daily weighted-averaging basic-reproduction-number method and evaluates it numerically against MERS-CoV data.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a new multivariate convex-optimization procedure with temporal and spatial regularization for estimating reproduction numbers.
